name: Willie's Custom Golf Center
about: Willie's Custom Golf Center is a golf improvement facility in Strasburg, Ohio, featuring both outdoor driving range and advanced indoor simulator technology. The center offers a variety of services including lessons, club fittings, and a pro shop, catering to golfers looking to improve their skills regardless of weather conditions. Pricing is structured per hour with options for individual and group play, as well as special packages for advanced swing analysis using Trackman technology.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Trackman technology for precise swing analysis
Indoor-to-outdoor hitting bays for all-weather practice
Comprehensive club fitting and repair services
Flexible pricing options for individuals and groups
Scenic Ohio backdrop creating a pleasant practice environment

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; BYOB policy not explicitly stated
No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB policy not explicitly stated

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor with dual radar technology

faq.answer: The venue doesn't explicitly state club rental availability, so it's recommended to bring your own equipment for the best experience.

faq.answer: There's no mention of food service or BYOB policy in the available information.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes isn't specified, but simulator sessions are priced by the hour (typically $34-100 depending on options).

faq.answer: Yes, the facility appears family-friendly with options for juniors and special group pricing, though specific kids' programs aren't detailed.
